LegacyEmbed.EmbedSelection.mapInfo: Displays a map. This code is placed alongside the main embed

LegacyEmbed.Presentation.legacyEmbedPres: Create an embed code to be used right away
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.legacyEmbedSumm: Use an embed code right away
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.legacyEmbedWarn: A redesign of this feature is under process; use as much as possible for a new integration the Customizable embed code method
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.pluginsPresenta: Use the plugin corresponding to your CMS, allowing for a flexible and advanced integration of your events: adapt the layout and the styles, chose the filters to use...
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.pluginsSummary: Your website is powered by Wordpress, Drupal or Typo3
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.portalPresentat: Deploy a dedicated bespoke events portal on your domain. This can be done by your web agency or by the OpenAgenda web development team.
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.portalSummary: You want a dedicated website to display your events
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.presentation: Several integration methods are available. Each allow you to display your events on your websites with filter and search features as well as graphical customization options
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.standardEmbedGe: We'll get back to you shortly with a ready to use embed code
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.standardEmbedPr: Get an embed code to place on a page of your website. It will display your events as well as the search and filtering features of your choice. Some visual adjustments are possible. The configuration and usage of this code are free.
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.standardEmbedSu: You want a simple and efficient embed code to place in your website
LegacyEmbed.Presentation.title: Integrate the agenda in your website
